name: circuit
description: Claude Code and Codex plugin that runs structured developer flows with per-step configurability, evidence, checks, traces, and reports.

scripts.soak:runtime:fast: vitest run tests/soak tests/runner/cli-runtime.test.ts tests/runtime tests/flow-runtime-smoke
scripts.soak:runtime: vitest run tests/soak && npm run verify && npm run check-flow-drift
scripts.emit-flows: npm run build && node scripts/flows/emit.ts && npm run build-plugin-runtime
scripts.check-flow-drift: npm run build && node scripts/flows/emit.ts --check && npm run check-plugin-runtime
scripts.emit-release: npm run build && node scripts/release/emit-current-capabilities.ts && node scripts/release/render-parity-matrix.ts && node scripts/release/render-readiness-report.ts
scripts.check-release-infra: npm run build && node scripts/release/emit-current-capabilities.ts --check && node scripts/release/check-parity.ts && node scripts/release/check-public-claims.ts && node scripts/release/check-proof-coverage.ts && node scripts/release/render-parity-matrix.ts --check && node scripts/release/render-readiness-report.ts --check && node scripts/release/audit-public-docs.ts && node scripts/release/audit-marketplace-safe-paths.ts
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test && npm run check-evals && npm run check-yaml-schemas && node scripts/flows/emit.ts --check && npm run check-plugin-runtime && npm run check-release-infra
scripts.verify:fast: npm run check && npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test:fast && npm run check-evals && npm run check-yaml-schemas && node scripts/flows/emit.ts --check && npm run check-plugin-runtime
